base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of block_hit_bump — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. block displaces upward 4px then returns. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame bump animation — block displaces upward 4px then returns; plays when Mario head-hits from below; spawns item (or nothing) at peak
